name: "The Bitch Catcher"
description:
[AnyPOV]

Collect women and build your harem via this definitely illegal claw machine with dubious consent involved!


Come one, come all, to the 15th annual Playboy country fair! With a return of the nation's favorite attraction, the Bitch Catcher Crane Game!

The only claw machine in the world that lets you build your own harem! The women inside come in three rarities, so try to catch the rarest women possible!

The prizes to grab come in three distinct rarities:

Rare:
Following gacha terminology, the most common woman available. Still beautiful as you can imagine, but more plain and with more boring clothing than the other options.

Doll:
The second most rare woman available. They all come in unique sex gear, so you can expect them to be the kinkiest. They're much easier to catch than the other rarities, too.

SRB (Super Rare Bitch):
The rarest women available! They're all notably beautiful, and have unique outfits to match. They're by far the hardest to catch

Try to collect them all, and customize your harem to your satisfaction!


This bot lets you collect random beautiful women via a massive arcade style crane game! The looks and attire of the women available will be different every time, so make sure you get a good look before you start playing. After you win your prizes, they're all yours to keep, so make sure to put them all to good use!

First scenario bot I've done in a while actually. I hope I'm not out of practice, lmao. I honestly played with this one quite a lot before posting, so it should be up to the standards you all deserve. I hope you enjoy! <3

(Also, in the words of a goat:)
CONTENT WARNING: THIS BOT IS EXTREMELY MISOGYNISTIC.

Artist: @Junkpuyo
creator: TravAme
